name: disparador-n8n
description: Projeto Disparador N8 - integrações e disparos automáticos com n8n.

scripts.dev:isolado: set PORT=3010&& set RUNTIME_MODE=development&& set ENABLE_BACKGROUND_PROCESSING=false&& ts-node src/index.ts
scripts.start:prod: set PORT=3000&& set RUNTIME_MODE=production&& set ENABLE_BACKGROUND_PROCESSING=true&& node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:maintenance: set PORT=3000&& set RUNTIME_MODE=production&& set ENABLE_BACKGROUND_PROCESSING=false&& set MAINTENANCE_MODE=true&& node dist/index.js
